claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Glass Health | Ambient Scribing & Clinical Decision Support

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The pricing page is accessible via the link from the homepage.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: All surfaces require login to access documentation or demos.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Available for Athena, Epic, eCW, Elation

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: We take patient privacy and data security extremely seriously. Our solution is meticulously designed to comply with the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA), ensuring robust protection for patient information at every interaction.
